translation: 会员：你现在可以使用大型精华袋来携带额外的精华。

english: You will now receive 3 Earth Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得3个大地符石。

english: Members can now craft Law Runes from Pure Rune Essence.
translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作律法符石。

english: You will now receive 6 Air Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得6个风符石。

english: You will now receive 5 Mind Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得5个心灵符石。

english: You will now receive 4 Water Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得4个水符石。

english: Members will now receive 2 Cosmic Runes from each Pure Rune Essence
translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个宇宙符石

english: Members can now infuse Eternal, Pegasian & Primordial boots!
translation: 会员现在可以注魔永恒靴、天马靴和原始靴！

english: Members can now craft Death Runes from Pure Rune Essence.
translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作死亡符石。

english: You will now receive 7 Air Runes from each Essence and members will receive 2 Sunfire Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得7个风符石，会员每个精华可以获得2个阳火符文。

english: You will now receive 6 Mind Runes and 3 Fire Runes from an Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得6个心灵符石和3个火符石。

english: Members will now receive 2 Chaos Runes from each Pure Rune Essence
translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个混沌符石

english: Members: You can now use Giant Pouches to carry additional Essence.
translation: 会员：你现在可以使用巨型精华袋袋来携带额外的精华。

english: You will now receive 5 Water Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得5个水符石。

english: Members can now craft Blood Runes from Pure Rune Essence or Dark Essence, and you will now receive 8 Air Runes from each Essence. Members can also infuse Splitbark boots and gauntlets with Blood Runes.
translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华或黑暗精华制作血符石，你现在每个精华可以获得8个风符石。会员还可以用血符石注魔裂皮靴和手套。

english: You will now receive 4 Earth Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得4个大地符石。

english: Members can now infuse the Splitbark helm with Blood Runes.
translation: 会员现在可以用血符石注魔裂皮头盔。

english: Members can now infuse Splitbark body and legs with Blood Runes.
translation: 会员现在可以用血符石注魔裂皮甲和裂皮腿。

english: Members will now receive 2 Astral Runes from each Pure Rune Essence
translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个星界符石

english: You will now receive 7 Mind Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得7个心灵符石。

english: Members with 56 Crafting can now make Colossal Pouches to carry more essence.
translation: 56级制作的会员现在可以制作特大精华袋来携带更多精华。

english: You will now receive 9 Air Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得9个风符石。

english: Members can now craft Soul Runes from Dark Essence.
translation: 会员现在可以用黑暗精华制作灵魂符石。

english: Members will now receive 2 Nature Runes from each Pure Rune Essence
translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个自然符石

english: You will now receive 3 Body Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得3个躯体符石。

english: You will now receive 6 Water Runes from each Essence. Members can now craft Wrath Runes and will receive 2 Law Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得6个水符石。会员现在可以制作愤怒符石，每个精华可以获得2个律法符石。

english: You will now receive 8 Mind Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得8个心灵符石。

english: You will now receive 10 Air Runes from each Essence, and Members will now receive 2 Death Runes and 3 Sunfire Runes from each Essence.
translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得10个风符石，会员每个精华可以获得2个死亡符石和3个阳火符文。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Runecrafting. Why not visit Aubury, who runs the rune shop in Varrock, where you can buy something special that is only available to true masters of the
translation: 恭喜！你现在是符石制作大师。为何不去拜访奥伯里，他在维洛克城经营符文店，在那里你可以购买只有真正的符石制作

english: Runecrafting skill!
translation: 技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: You must complete the Pandemonium quest to unlock the Sailing skill.
translation: 你必须完成潘德莫尼姆任务才能解锁航海技能。

english: Sailing gives you the ability to captain a boat and sail the seas of Gielinor. Out at sea, you'll find all kinds of things to do. You can salvage shipwrecks for sunken treasure, test yourself in Barracuda Trials, or explore uncharted islands, just to name a few.
translation: 航海技能让你能够驾驶船只航行于基利诺尔的海洋。在海上你会发现各种各样的事情可做。你可以打捞沉船寻找沉没的宝藏，在梭鱼试炼中测试自己，或探索未知岛屿等等。

english: As your Sailing level increases, you'll be able to own more boats, build better facilities on your boats, hire more crewmates, dock at more locations, and much more!
translation: 随着你的航海等级提高，你将能够拥有更多船只，在船上建造更好的设施，雇佣更多船员，在更多地点停靠等等！

english: You can now dock your boat at Land's End and Hosidius.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在兰兹角村和霍西迪乌斯城。

english: You can now accept up to two port tasks at the same time.
translation: 你现在最多可以同时接受两个港口任务。

english: You can now dock your boat at Musa Point.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在穆萨角。

english: You can now chart drink crates (after completing Prying Times).
translation: 你现在可以绘制饮料箱海图 (完成撬开宝箱后)。

english: You can now captain a skiff, own two different boats, dock your boat at Port Piscarillius, salvage from small shipwrecks and build a bronze salvaging hook.
translation: 你现在可以驾驶小艇和拥有两艘不同的船，以及将船停靠在皮斯卡里琉斯港，并从小型沉船中打捞并建造青铜打捞钩。

english: You can now build a range (with 6 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造炉灶 (需要6级建筑)。

english: You can now build an iron helm (with 14 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁制头盔 (需要14级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rimmington and build an oak cargo hold (with 11 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在里明顿村并建造橡木货舱 (需要11级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Catherby and build an oak hull (with 8 Construction.)
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯瑟比镇并建造橡木船体 (需要8级建筑。)

english: You can now build an iron salvaging hook (with 9 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁制打捞钩 (需要9级建筑)。

english: You can now chart sea currents (after completing Current Affairs) and build an iron keel (with 17 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以绘制海流海图 (完成时事后) 并建造铁制龙骨 (需要17级建筑)。

english: You can now build an oak mast and linen sails (with 11 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造橡木桅杆和亚麻帆 (需要11级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Brimhaven and build flags and trims (with 20 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在布尔哈文镇并建造旗帜和装饰 (需要20级建筑)。

english: You can now salvage from fisherman's shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以从渔夫沉船中打捞。

english: You can now build a steel salvaging hook (with 18 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造钢制打捞钩 (需要18级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Ardougne, accept up to three port tasks at the same time and build a bronze cannon (with 21 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阿多尼城，最多同时接受三个港口任务并建造青铜大炮 (需要21级建筑)。

english: You can now build a teak cargo hold (with 21 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造柚木货舱 (需要21级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Port Khazard and take on the Tempor Tantrum Barracuda Trial in the Storm Tempor.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在卡扎德港并在风暴海域中接受大海之怒梭鱼试炼。

english: You can now build a teak hull (with 23 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造柚木船体 (需要23级建筑)。

english: You can now build a Keg (with 25 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造桶 (需要25级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Witchaven.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在海巫港。

english: You can now salvage from Barracuda shipwrecks and build an iron cannon (with 28 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以从梭鱼沉船中打捞并建造铁制大炮 (需要28级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Entrana and build a teak mast and canvas sail (with 26 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在恩特纳岛并建造柚木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要26级建筑)。

english: You can now build an anchor (with 26 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造锚 (需要26级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Civitas illa Fortis (after completing Children of the Sun), chart sea depths (after completing Recipe for Disaster - Freeing Pirate Pete) and build a steel helm (with 30 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在福蒂斯城 (完成太阳之子后)，绘制海洋深度海图 (完成灾难食谱 - 解救海盗皮特后 )并建造钢制头盔 (需要30级建筑)。

english: You can now build a steel keel (with 32 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造钢制龙骨 (需要32级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Corsair Cove (after completing The corsair Curse) and Dognose Island, assign one crewmate to duties on your boat, recruit Jobless Jim from Port Sarim and build an innoculation station (with 37 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在海盗湾 (完成海盗诅咒后) 和多格诺斯岛，分配一名船员在船上工作，从沙林港招募无业吉姆并建造净化站 (需要37级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Cairn Isle and Chinchompa Island and build a salvaging station (with 34 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯恩岛和炸弹鼠岛并建造打捞站 (需要34级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Sunset Coast (after completing Children of the Sun) and build a mithril salvaging hook (with 30 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在日落海岸 (完成太阳之子后) 并建造秘银打捞钩 (需要30级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at both the Summer Shore and the Little Pearl (after completing Troubled Tortugans).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在夏日海岸和小珍珠岛 (完成困扰的海龟人后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Aldarin (after completing Children of the Sun) and Vatrachos Island and build a mahogany cargo hold (with 41 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阿尔达林岛 (完成太阳之子后)和瓦特拉科斯岛并建造红木货舱 (需要41级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Onyx Crest and build a steel cannon (with 39 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在玛瑙山脊岛并建造钢制大炮 (需要39级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Ruins of Unkah and build a mahogany hull (with 41 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在昂卡遗址并建造红木船体 (需要41级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Shimmering Atoll.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在闪烁环礁。

english: You can now captain a sloop, own three different boats, dock at the Void Knights' Outpost and Port Roberts and recruit Captain Siad from the Desert Mining Camp (after completing The Tourist Trap).
translation: 你现在可以驾驶单桅帆船和拥有三艘不同的船，以及停靠在虚空骑士前哨站和罗伯特港并从沙漠采矿营招募西亚德船长 (完成旅游陷阱后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Anglers' Retreat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在垂钓者隐居地。

english: You can now build a mahogany mast and canvas sails (with 45 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造红木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要45级建筑)。

english: You can now salvage from large shipwrecks and build a wind catcher (with 47 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以从大型沉船中打捞并建造捕风器 (需要47级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Minotaurs' Rest and build a mithril keel (with 50 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在牛头怪安息地并建造秘银龙骨 (需要50级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Isle of Souls, take on the Jubbly Jive Barracuda Trial in Backwater, assign two crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Adventurer Ada from the Pandemonium, build a mithril helm (with 47 Construction) and build a teleport focus (with 49 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在灵魂岛、在回水湾接受胖食人鸟摇摆梭鱼试炼、分配两名船员在船上工作、从潘德莫尼姆岛招募冒险者阿达、建造秘银头盔 (需要47级建筑)和建造传送核心 (需要49级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Isle of Bones, accept up to four port tasks at the same time and build a rope trawling net (with 45 Construction) and a chum station (with 45 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在白骨岛，以及最多同时接受四个港口任务并建造绳索拖网 (需要45级建筑)和诱饵台 (需要45级建筑)。

english: You can now chart weather patterns and build a mithril cannon (with 50 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以绘制天气模式海图并建造秘银大炮 (需要50级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Laguna Aurorae.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在极光泻湖。

english: You can now build an adamant salvaging hook (with 52 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造精金打捞钩 (需要52级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Charred Island, recruit Cabin Boy Jenkins from Crandor (after completing Dragon Slayer I) and build a camphor cargo hold (with 53 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在焦黑岛，以及从克兰多岛招募船舱侍应詹金斯 (完成屠龙者 I 后) 并建造樟木货舱 (需要53级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Tear of the Soul.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在灵魂之泪。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rellekka (after completing The Fremennik Trials).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在雷勒卡城 (完成费明尼克试炼后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Wintumber Island.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在冬木岛。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Crown Jewel and salvage from pirate shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在皇冠宝石并从海盗沉船中打捞。

english: You can now dock your boat at Etceteria (after completing Royal Trouble) and recruit Oarswoman Olga from Burgh de Rott (after completing In Aid of the Myreque).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在埃西特利亚岛 (完成皇家麻烦后)并从伯格德罗特镇招募女桨手奥尔加 (完成援助迈雷克后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Port Tyras (after completing Regicide) and Lledrith Island and build an adamant keel (with 62 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在提拉斯港 (完成弑君后)和莱德里思岛并建造精金龙骨 (需要62级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Deepfin Point and build a camphor hull (with 59 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在深鳍岬并建造樟木船体 (需要59级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at both Jatizso and Neitiznot (after completing The Fremennik Isles), build a camphor mast and canvas sails (with 60 Construction), build a linen trawling net (with 61 Construction) and build an advanced chum station (with 61 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在加提兹索岛和奈提兹诺镇 (完成费明尼克群岛后)，以及建造樟木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要60级建筑)、亚麻拖网 (需要61级建筑)和高级诱饵台 (需要61级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rainbow's End and build an adamant cannon (with 61 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在彩虹尽头并建造精金大炮 (需要61级建筑)。

english: You can now dock at Prifddinas (after completing Song of the Elves), assign three crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Jittery Jim from Port Khazard and build a fathom stone (with 62 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在普里夫迪纳斯城 (完成精灵之歌后)、分配三名船员在船上工作、从卡扎德港招募紧张吉姆和建造测深石 (需要62级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Sunbleak Island, take on the Gwenith Glide Barracuda Trial in Port Gwenith (after completing Regicide) and build an adamant helm (with 59 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在日晒岛，以及在格温尼斯港接受格温尼斯滑翔梭鱼试炼 (完成弑君后)并建造精金头盔 (需要59级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Ynysdail, salvage from mercenary shipwrecks and build a Crystal extractor (with 67 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在伊尼斯代尔，从雇佣兵沉船中打捞并建造水晶提取器 (需要67级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Waterbirth Island (after completing The Fremennik Trials) and build a rune salvaging hook (with 66 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在水诞岛 (完成费明尼克试炼后) 并建造符文打捞钩 (需要66级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Piscatoris (after completing Swan Song) and build a greater teleport focus (with 69 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在皮斯卡托里斯 (完成天鹅之歌后) 并建造强效传送核心 (需要69级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Lunar Isle (after completing Lunar Diplomacy) and Buccaneers' Haven.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在月亮岛 (完成月亮外交后) 和海盗避风港。

english: You can now own four different boats and build an eternal brazier (with 72 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以拥有四艘不同的船并建造永恒火盆 (需要72级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Drumstick Isle, build a gale catcher (with 70 Construction) and build a hemp trawling net (with 70 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在鸡腿岛，以及建造狂风收集器 (需要70级建筑)和大麻拖网 (需要70级建筑)。

english: You can now dock at Weiss (after completing Making Friends with My Arm), salvage from Fremennik shipwrecks, recruit Bosun Zarah from Etceteria (after completing Royal Trouble), build a rune cannon (with 76 Construction) and build an ironwood cargo hold (with 77 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在魏斯聚落 (完成与''我的手臂''交朋友后)、从费明尼克沉船中打捞、从埃西特利亚岛招募水手长扎拉 (完成皇家麻烦后)、建造符文大炮 (需要76级建筑)和铁木货舱 (需要77级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Brittle Isle and build an ironwood hull (with 75 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在脆裂岛并建造铁木船体 (需要75级建筑)。

english: You can now build a chum spreader (with 74 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造鱼饵投放机 (需要74级建筑)。

english: You can now build an ironwood mast and cotton sails (with 77 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁木桅杆和棉帆 (需要77级建筑)。

english: You can now accept up to five port tasks at the same time and build a cotton trawling net (with 73 Construction).
translation: 你现在最多可以同时接受五个港口任务并建造棉拖网 (需要73级建筑)。

english: You can now assign four crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Jolly Jim from Brimhaven and build a rune keel (with 78 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以分配四名船员在船上工作，以及从布尔哈文镇招募快乐吉姆并建造符文龙骨 (需要78级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon salvaging hook (with 78 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金打捞钩 (需要78级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Grimstone, salvage from merchant shipwrecks and build a rune helm (with 81 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阴森石，从商人沉船中打捞并建造符文头盔 (需要81级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood cargo hold (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木货舱 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now recruit Spotter Virginia from the Ruins of Unkah (after subduing Tempoross 100 times).
translation: 你现在可以从昂卡遗址招募瞭望员弗吉尼亚 (击败海灵100次后)。

english: You can now own five different boats and build a fathom pearl (with 83 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以拥有五艘不同的船并建造测深珍珠 (需要83级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon cannon (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金大炮 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood hull (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木船体 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood mast and cotton sails (with 85 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木桅杆和棉帆 (需要85级建筑)。

english: You can now assign five crewmates to duties on your boat and recruit Sailor Jakob from Catherby.
translation: 你现在可以分配五名船员在船上工作并从凯瑟比镇招募水手雅各布。

english: You can now build a dragon helm (with 86 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金头盔 (需要86级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon keel (with 87 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金龙骨 (需要87级建筑)。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Sailing. Why not visit Brass Hand Harry on the Pandemonium? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Sailing skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是航海大师。为何不去潘德莫尼姆岛拜访铜手哈里？他有唯有真正的航海技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Slayer is a skill that lets you fight increasingly dangerous and lucrative monsters. Some monsters can only be fought if you have a high enough Slayer level.
translation: 杀戮是一项让你与越来越危险且奖励更丰厚的怪物战斗的技能。有些怪物只有达到足够的杀戮等级才能击杀。

english: To get started with Slayer, you'll first need a Slayer task, which can be obtained from a Slayer Master. You can then kill the assigned target to get Slayer experience.
translation: 要开始训练杀戮技能，你首先需要从杀戮大师获得杀戮任务，然后击杀指定目标来获得杀戮经验。

english: Once you've completed five tasks, you can start earning reward points, which can be used to skip or block tasks you don't want, or purchase various items and benefits like extended tasks.
translation: 完成五个任务后，你就可以开始赚取奖励点数。这些点数可用于跳过或屏蔽你不想要的任务，或购买各种物品和特权，例如增加任务的目标数量。

english: Smithing lets you convert raw ores into useful metals, then use those metals to make your own weapons and armour.
translation: 锻造技能让你可以将矿石转化为金属锭，然后使用这些金属锭制作你自己的武器和盔甲。

english: To smelt ores, simply take the mix of ores you need to any furnace and you'll be able to convert them into bars.
translation: 要冶炼矿石，只需将所需矿石带到任何熔炉，你就可以将它们转化为金属锭。

english: Once you have your bars, grab a hammer and take them to an anvil. Bigger items will need more bars to make.
translation: 准备好金属锭后，带上锤子前往铁砧即可制作。制作大型物品需要消耗更多的金属锭。

english: As you advance your Smithing level, you'll be able to make more gear out of higher quality metals.
translation: 随着你提升锻造等级，你将能够用更高质量的金属制作更多装备。

english: You can now make Bronze Maces.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜钉锤。

english: You can now make Bronze Medium Helms and members can make Bronze Crossbow Bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜中盔，会员可以制作青铜弩箭。

english: You can now make Bronze Short Swords, and members can make Bronze Dart Tips, Bronze Wire and Bronze Nails.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜短剑，会员可以制作青铜镖尖、青铜丝和青铜钉。

english: You can now make Bronze Scimitars and members can make Bronze Arrow Heads, Bronze Spears and Bronze Hastae.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜弯刀，会员可以制作青铜箭头、青铜长矛和青铜刺矛。

english: You can now make Bronze Long Swords. Members can make Bronze Crossbow Limbs and Bronze Javelin Heads and convert Steel Felling Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜长剑。会员可以制作青铜弩臂、青铜标枪标头和钢制伐木斧。

english: You can now make Bronze Full Helms and members can make Bronze Throwing Knives.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜头盔，会员可以制作青铜投掷飞刀。

english: You can now make Bronze Square Shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜方盾。

english: You can now make Bronze Warhammers.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜战锤。

english: You can now make Bronze Battle Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜战斧。

english: You can now make Bronze Chainmail Bodies and members can convert Black Felling Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜链甲，会员可以制作黑铁伐木斧。

translation: 你现在可以制作青铜鸢盾。

english: Members can now make Bronze Claws.
translation: 会员现在可以制作青铜爪。

english: You can now make Bronze Two Handed Swords and there is more information available from the Smithing Apprentice tutor in Lumbridge.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜双手剑，仑桥镇的锻造学徒导师那里有新的讯息。

english: You can now smelt Iron Ore and make Iron Daggers.
translation: 你现在可以冶炼铁矿石并制作铁制匕首。

english: You can now make Bronze Plate Legs, Bronze plate skirts and Iron Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜腿甲、青铜裙甲和铁斧。

translation: 你现在可以制作铁制钉锤，会员可以制作铁制烤肉叉。

translation: 你现在可以冶炼钢并制作钢制匕首。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金中盔，会员可以制作精金弩箭和谢兹恩胸甲 (3)。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金短剑，会员可以制作精金镖尖、精金钉、余烬之光和水晶胸甲。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金弯刀。会员可以制作精金箭头、精金长矛、精金刺矛、谢兹恩手套 (4)、龙金鸢盾和坚固安全带。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金战锤，会员可以制作谢兹恩头盔 (4)。

english: You can now make Adamant Battleaxes, Godsword blades, enhanced crystal keys and eternal teleport crystals.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金战斧、神剑剑刃、强化水晶钥匙和永恒传送水晶。

english: You can now make Adamant Chainmail Bodies and members can make Shayzien greaves (4).
translation: 你现在可以制作精金链甲，会员可以制作谢兹恩护腿 (4)。

english: You can now make Adamant Kite Shields and members can make Blades of Saeldor and Bows of Faerdhinen.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金鸢盾，会员可以制作赛尔多尔之刃和法尔迪宁之弓。

english: Members can now make Adamant Claws and Shayzien platebodies (4).
translation: 会员现在可以制作精金爪和谢兹恩胸甲 (4)。

english: You can now make Adamant Two Handed Swords.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金双手剑。

english: You can now smelt Runite Ore and make Rune Daggers. Members can attach Sigils to Blessed Spirit Shields, create infernal pickaxes, make Shayzien gloves (5) and the Ursine Chainmace.
translation: 你现在可以冶炼符文矿石并制作符文匕首。会员可以将符印附加到被祝福的精神护盾，制作地狱镐、谢兹恩手套 (5) 和熊爪链枷。

english: You can now make Adamant Plate Legs, Adamant plate skirts and Rune Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金腿甲、精金裙甲和符文斧。

english: You can now make Rune Maces and members can make Shayzien boots (5).
translation: 你现在可以制作符文钉锤，会员可以制作谢兹恩靴 (5)。

english: You can now make Adamant Plate Bodies and Rune Medium Helms and members can make Runite Crossbow Bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金胸甲和符文中盔，会员可以制作符文弩箭。

english: You can now make Rune Short Swords. Members can make Rune Dart Tips, Rune Nails and Shayzien helms (5).
translation: 你现在可以制作符文短剑。会员可以制作符文镖尖、符文钉和谢兹恩头盔 (5)。

english: You can now make Rune Scimitars and members can make Rune Arrow Heads, Rune Spears, Rune Hastae, Dragonfire shields, Dragonfire wards, Dragon platebodies, Torva armour and Elidinis' ward.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文弯刀，会员可以制作符文箭头、符文长矛、符文刺矛、龙火盾、龙火护符、龙金胸甲、托瓦盔甲和伊莉迪尼斯护符。

english: You can now make Rune Long Swords. Members can make Rune Crossbow Limbs, Rune Javelin Heads and Shayzien greaves (5).
translation: 你现在可以制作符文长剑。会员可以制作符文弩臂、符文标枪标头和谢兹恩护腿 (5)。

english: You can now make Rune Full Helms and members can make Rune Throwing Knives.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文头盔，会员可以制作符文投掷飞刀。

english: You can now make Rune Square Shields and members can make Shayzien platebodies (5).
translation: 你现在可以制作符文方盾，会员可以制作谢兹恩胸甲 (5)。

english: You can now make Rune Warhammers.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文战锤。

english: You can now make Rune Battleaxes.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文战斧。

english: You can now make Rune Chainmail Bodies.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文链甲。

english: You can now make Rune Kite Shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作符文鸢盾。

english: Members can now make Rune Claws.
translation: 会员现在可以制作符文爪。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master smith. Why not visit Thurgo, who lives near Mudskipper Point? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Smithing skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是锻造大师。为何不去拜访住在泥跳角附近的瑟戈？他有唯有真正的锻造技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Your Strength level determines your max hit in combat. Whenever you hit your opponent, you will deal a random amount of damage up to your max hit.
translation: 你的力量等级决定你在战斗中的最大伤害。每当你击中对手时，你将造成随机伤害，最高可达你的最大伤害。

english: Most weapons have a Strength bonus that will also increase your max hit. You can view your Strength bonus (and all of your equipment's stats) by selecting 'View equipment stats' under the Worn Equipment side panel.
translation: 大多数武器都有力量加成，这也会增加你的最大伤害。你可以通过在装备面板下选择''查看装备属性''来查看你的力量加成 (以及你所有装备的属性)。

english: You can now wield Steel Warhammers. Members can now wield Black Halberds and White Halberds.
translation: 你现在可以使用钢制战锤。会员现在可以使用黑铁戟和白骑士戟。

english: You can now wield Black Warhammers. Members can now wield White Warhammers, and Mithril Halberds.
translation: 你现在可以使用黑铁战锤。会员现在可以使用白骑士战锤和秘银戟。

english: Members can now wield Adamant Halberds.
translation: 会员现在可以使用精金戟。

english: You can now wield Mithril Warhammers. Members can now wield Rune Halberds.
translation: 你现在可以使用秘银战锤。会员现在可以使用符文戟。

english: You can now wield Adamant Warhammers.
translation: 你现在可以使用精金战锤。

english: You can now wield Rune Warhammers.
translation: 你现在可以使用符文战锤。

english: Members can now wield Void Knight equipment!
translation: 会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: Members can now wield Granite armour and the Granite hammer & maul.
translation: 会员现在可以使用花岗岩盔甲和花岗岩锤与重锤。

english: Members can now wield Dragon Warhammers and the Ancient Sceptre, and access the God Wars Dungeon via the Strength shortcut.
translation: 会员现在可以使用龙金战锤和古代权杖，并通过力量捷径进入神战地牢。

english: Members can access the Bandos area in the God Wars Dungeon and wear Inquisitor's Armour.
translation: 会员可以进入神战地牢的班多斯区域并穿戴审判官盔甲。

english: Members can wield the Abyssal bludgeon, access the Bandos area in the God Wars Dungeon and wear Inquisitor's Armour.
translation: 会员可以使用深渊棍棒，进入神战地牢的班多斯区域并穿戴审判官盔甲。

english: Members can now equip Primordial boots!
translation: 会员现在可以装备原始靴！

english: Members can now equip the Soulreaper axe!
translation: 会员现在可以装备猎魂斧！

english: Members can now equip the Scythe of vitur!
translation: 会员现在可以装备维图尔镰刀！

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Strength. Why not visit [Sloane/Yadech Strongarm] at the Warriors' Guild? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Strength skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是力量大师。为何不去战士公会拜访斯隆或者雅德克‧强臂？他有唯有真正的力量技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Thieving lets you steal items from various people and stalls. Be careful, as people won't take too kindly to you going through their pockets, and might call the guards on you, or may take matters into their own hands.
translation: 偷窃技能让你从各种人和摊位偷窃物品。要小心，因为人们不会太喜欢你翻他们的口袋，可能会叫守卫来抓你，或者可能会亲自动手。

english: As your Thieving level increases, the odds of you successfully stealing from your target will increase. You will also gain access to more lucrative targets with more valuable loot.
translation: 随着你的偷窃等级提高，你成功从目标偷窃的几率会增加。你还将可以偷窃收益更高的目标和更有价值的战利品。

english: You can now steal from Cake Stalls, Tea Stalls, Crafting Stalls and Monkey Food Stalls!
translation: 你现在可以从蛋糕摊位、茶水摊位、制作摊位和猴子食物摊位偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Farmers!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃农夫！

english: You can now steal from certain chests in Ardougne, Rellekka and the Wilderness!
translation: 你现在可以从阿多尼城、雷勒卡城和荒野的某些箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from HAM followers and steal cowbells from Dairy Cows!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃反怪物人联追随者并从奶牛那里偷窃牛铃！

english: You can now steal from Silk Stalls and pick locks on Zogre coffins at Jiggig.
translation: 你现在可以从丝绸摊位偷窃并在吉吉格撬开佐格雷食人魔棺材的锁！

english: You can now enter the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓。

english: You can now steal from Wine Stalls!
translation: 你现在可以从葡萄酒摊位偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Warriors, steal from Fruit Stalls and enter the sorceress's Spring garden!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃战士，从水果摊位偷窃并进入女巫的春季花园！

english: You can now steal from Seed Stalls!
translation: 你现在可以从种子摊位偷窃！

english: You can now steal from certain chests upstairs in Ardougne, in Rellekka and on the Isle of Souls!
translation: 你现在可以从阿多尼城、雷勒卡城和灵魂岛楼上的某些箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Villagers!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃村民！

english: You can now enter the second room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第二间房间。

english: You can now pickpocket from Rogues!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃盗贼！

english: You can now steal from Fur Stalls!
translation: 你现在可以从毛皮摊位偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket Cave Golbins and steal from chests in Aldarin Villas!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃洞穴哥布林并从阿尔达林岛别墅的箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Master Farmers!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃农业大师！

english: You can now pickpocket from City Guards!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃城市守卫！

english: You can now enter the third room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第三间房间。

english: You can now steal from Fish Stalls!
translation: 你现在可以从鱼摊位偷窃！

english: You can now steal from certain chests upstairs in Ardougne!
translation: 你现在可以从阿多尼城楼上的某些箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now steal from the Dorgeshuun wire machine!
translation: 你现在可以从多格舒恩电线机偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Fremenniks, bearded bandit thugs in Pollnivneach and enter the sorceress's Autumn garden!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃费明尼克人、波尼尼镇的胡子强盗暴徒并进入女巫的秋季花园！

english: You can now steal from certain chests in Hemenster and Rellekka with the aid of a lockpick!
translation: 你现在可以在开锁器的帮助下从赫门斯特和雷勒卡城的某些箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now steal from Crossbow Stalls and pick locks in Port Piscarilius with the aid of a lockpick!
translation: 你现在可以在开锁器的帮助下从弩摊位偷窃并在皮斯卡里琉斯港撬锁！

english: You can now pickpocket from Wealthy Citizens, steal from Silver Stalls, crack Wall Safes in Rogues' Den, and Rob houses in Civitas illa Fortis!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃富裕市民，从银器摊位偷窃，在盗贼巢穴破解墙壁保险箱，并在福蒂斯城抢劫房屋！

english: You can now enter the fourth room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第四间房间。

english: You can now steal from average chests in Dorgesh-Kaan.
translation: 你现在可以从多吉需坎城的普通箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Desert Bandits!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃沙漠强盗！

english: You can now pickpocket from Knights of Ardougne and Bandits in Pollnivneach!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃阿多尼骑士和波尼尼镇的强盗！

english: You can now pick-lock the door to the Grubby Chest in the Forthos Dungeon!
translation: 你现在可以撬开福索斯地牢中肮脏宝箱的门！

english: You can now steal from chests under the Chaos Druid Tower near Ardougne!
translation: 你现在可以从阿多尼城附近的混沌德鲁伊塔下的箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now enter the fifth room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第五间房间。

english: You can now steal from chests in the Lizardman Temple.
translation: 你现在可以从蜥蜴人神殿的箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now steal from Spice Stalls, Magic Stalls and Scimitar Stalls, pickpocket from Watchmen and Menaphite thugs and enter the sorceress's Summer garden!
translation: 你现在可以从香料摊位、魔法摊位和弯刀摊位偷窃，扒窃看守和梅纳菲特暴徒并进入女巫的夏季花园！

english: You can now steal from coffins within The Hallowed Sepulchre.
translation: 你现在可以从神圣墓穴内的棺材中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Paladins!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃圣骑士！

english: You can now enter the sixth room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第六间房间。

english: You can now steal from certain chests in the castle in Ardougne!
translation: 你现在可以从阿多尼城堡中的某些箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now steal from Gem Stalls and pickpocket from Gnomes!
translation: 你现在可以从宝石摊位偷窃并扒窃地精！

english: You can now steal from rich chests in Dorgesh-Kaan.
translation: 你现在可以从多吉需坎城的富裕箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Heroes!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃英雄！

english: You can now enter the seventh room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第七间房间。

english: You can now steal from Ore Stalls and pickpocket from Vyres!
translation: 你现在可以从矿石摊位偷窃并扒窃吸血鬼！

english: You can now steal from chests at the Rogues' Castle.
translation: 你现在可以从盗贼城堡的箱子中偷窃！

english: You can now pickpocket from Elves!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃精灵！

english: You can now pickpocket from Tzhaar!
translation: 你现在可以扒窃特扎尔！

english: You can now enter the eigth and final room of the Jalsavrah tombs in Sophanem.
translation: 你现在可以进入索法尼恩的贾尔萨夫拉坟墓的第八间也是最后一间房间。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master thief. Why not visit Martin Thwait who runs a shop at the Rogues' Den, where you can buy something special that is only available to true masters of the Thieving skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是偷窃大师。为何不去拜访在盗贼巢穴经营商店的马丁‧斯韦特，在那里你可以购买只有真正的偷窃技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Woodcutting allows you to chop down trees to obtain logs. Most trees in the game can be chopped down with an axe.
translation: 伐木技能让你砍伐树木以获得原木。游戏中的大多数树木都可以用斧头砍伐。

english: Increasing your Woodcutting level will give you a higher chance of successfully chopping a tree. You'll also gain access to more trees to cut down.
translation: 提高伐木等级将增加成功砍伐树木的几率，还将解锁更多可砍伐的树木。

english: In addition to this, higher Woodcutting levels grant access to more powerful axes, which also increase the chance of chopping trees. Note that you can still use an axe in your inventory if you have the Woodcutting level for it, even if you don't have the Attack level to equip it.
translation: 除此之外，更高的伐木等级可让你使用更强大的斧头，这也增加砍伐树木的几率。请注意，即使没有装备所需的攻击等级，只要有足够的伐木等级，仍可在物品栏中直接使用斧头。

english: You can now chop with a Steel Axe and members can now chop with a Steel Felling Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用钢斧砍伐，会员现在可以使用钢制伐木斧砍伐。

english: Members can now cut down Light Jungle.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐稀疏丛林。

english: You can now chop with a Black Axe and members can now chop with a Black Felling Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用黑铁斧砍伐，会员现在可以使用黑铁伐木斧砍伐。

english: You can now make and paddle a Log Canoe.
translation: 你现在可以制作和划动原木独木舟。

english: You can now cut down Oak Trees.
translation: 你现在可以砍伐橡树。

english: There is new information available from the Woodcutting Tutor in Lumbridge.
translation: 仑桥镇的伐木导师那里有新的讯息。

english: Members can now cut down Medium Jungle.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐中等丛林。

english: You can now chop with a Mithril Axe and members can now chop with a Mithril Felling Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用秘银斧砍伐，会员现在可以使用秘银伐木斧砍伐。

english: You can now make and paddle a Dugout Canoe.
translation: 你现在可以制作和划动独木舟。

english: You can now cut down Willow Trees.
translation: 你现在可以砍伐柳树。

english: You can now chop with an Adamant Axe and members can now chop with an Adamant Felling Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用精金斧砍伐，会员现在可以使用精金伐木斧砍伐。

english: Members can now cut down Dense Jungle and Teak Trees and craft Forester's Rations, Secateurs Attachments and Bees on a Stick.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐茂密丛林和柚木树并制作护林员的口粮、修枝剪配件和棍上的蜜蜂。

english: You can now chop with a Rune Axe and Gilded Axe, and members can now chop with a Rune Felling Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用符文斧和镀金斧砍伐，会员现在可以使用符文伐木斧砍伐。

english: You can now make and paddle a Stable Dugout Canoe and members can cut down Juniper Trees.
translation: 你现在可以制作和划动稳固的独木舟，会员可以砍伐杜松树。

english: Members can now wear the Undead Lumberjack clothing.
translation: 会员现在可以装备亡灵伐木工服装。

english: You can now cut down Maple Trees and members can cut down Hollow Trees.
translation: 你现在可以砍伐枫树，会员可以砍伐空心树。

english: Members can now cut down Mahogany Trees and craft Clothes Pouches and Petal Circlets.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐红木树并制作衣物袋和花瓣冠。

english: Members can now cut down arctic pine.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐北极松。

english: Members can now split arctic pine logs and make Fremennik round shields.
translation: 会员现在可以劈开北极松原木并制作费明尼克圆盾。

english: You can now make and paddle a Waka Canoe.
translation: 你现在可以制作和划动瓦卡独木舟。

english: You can now cut down Yew Trees.
translation: 你现在可以砍伐紫杉树。

english: Members can now chop with a Dragon Axe, Infernal Axe or Dragon Felling Axe.
translation: 会员现在可以使用龙金斧、地狱斧或龙金伐木斧砍伐。

english: Members can now chop logs from the Blisterwood Tree.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐水泡木树的原木。

english: Members can now chop Sulliuscep mushrooms on Fossil Island.
translation: 会员现在可以在化石岛砍伐苏利乌斯塞普蘑菇。

english: Members can now craft Nature offerings.
translation: 会员现在可以制作自然祭品。

english: Members can now chop with a Crystal Axe or Crystal Felling Axe.
translation: 会员现在可以使用水晶斧或水晶伐木斧砍伐。

english: Members can now cut down Magic Trees and craft Sturdy Harnesses.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐魔法树并制作坚固安全带。

english: Members can now chop Redwood Trees.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐红杉树。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Woodcutting. Why not visit Wilfred, near Lumbridge, who has something special that is only available to true masters of the Woodcutting skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是伐木大师。为何不去拜访仑桥镇附近的威尔弗雷德，他有唯有真正的伐木技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: You can now use the Kourent Catacombs pillar jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用库伦特地下墓穴的柱子跳跃敏捷捷径。

english: You can now use the Agility Pyramid, the Varrock course, the Stepping stones in south eastern Karamja and the Corsair Cove Resource Area shortcut. You can also use the Penguin Agility Course if you have begun the Cold War quest.
translation: 你现在可以使用敏捷金字塔、维洛克城训练场、卡拉姆詹岛东南部的踏脚石以及海盗湾资源区的捷径。如果你已经开始冷战任务，还可以使用企鹅敏捷训练场。

english: You can now use Ardougne log balance Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿多尼城的原木平衡木敏捷捷径。

english: You can now enter the Barbarian Agility Course.
translation: 你现在可以进入野蛮人敏捷训练场。

english: Members can get off the water obelisk island near Catherby with a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以用秘银抓钩离开凯瑟比镇附近的水方尖碑岛。

english: You can now use Trollheim medium cliffside scramble Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔山的中等悬崖攀爬敏捷捷径。

translation: 你现在可以使用塔韦利地牢的小恶魔栅栏敏捷捷径和达克迈尔城墙捷径。

english: You can now use the Cosmic Temple advanced narrow walkway Agility shortcut and jump the stepping stone from Lumbridge to the Desert.
translation: 你现在可以使用宇宙神殿的高级窄道敏捷捷径，以及从仑桥镇跳到沙漠的踏脚石。

english: You can now use the Prifddinas Agility Course, the medium Revenant Cave shortcuts and the Forthos Dungeon shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用普里夫迪纳斯城敏捷训练场、中等亡灵洞穴捷径和福索斯地牢捷径。

english: You can now use the Shilo Village river crossing.
translation: 你现在可以使用希洛村的河流渡口。

english: You can now use the Kharazi Jungle vine climb.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡拉兹丛林的藤蔓攀爬。

english: You can now use the Slayer Dungeon spiked blades jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用杀戮地牢的尖刺刀片跳跃敏捷捷径。

translation: 你现在可以进入神圣墓穴的第四层，并使用熔岩迷宫的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now use the Elven Overpass advanced cliffside scramble.
translation: 你现在可以使用精灵高架桥的高级悬崖攀爬。

english: You can now use the Kalphite Lair crevice.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡尔夫特虫巢的裂缝。

translation: 苹果酒桶, 高级植物, 储藏单元 (入门)

translation: 橡树, 小恶魔雕像

translation: 你现在可以建造：开拓者地毯 地毯 一套盔甲

translation: 橡木奖品箱, 拳击手套架, 橡木服装架

translation: 你现在可以建造：金水槽, 水槽, 橡木恶魔讲台, 橡木鹰形讲台, 神话斗篷, 传奇斗篷, 荣耀护符, 反龙盾, 森林宠物栖息地

translation: 你现在可以建造：仆人的钱袋, 华丽的亡灵训练假人, 礼拜堂铃铛, 中型杀戮怪物头, 中型地图

translation: 你现在可以建造：月球地球仪, 猜词游戏, 石灰石训练石柱, 木栅栏, 扎莫拉克圣物, 古斯圣物, 萨拉多明圣物, 红木宠物抓挠柱, 红木

translation: 你现在可以建造：镀金红木餐凳 橡木香炉 王座室地板装饰

translation: 你现在可以建造：带虎钳的工作台 柚木礼服盒

translation: 你现在可以建造：旗帜架, 柚木花园长凳, 迷迭香, 向日葵, 能量水晶, 壁挂叉鱼, 华丽的旗帜架, 圆形壁挂盾, 柚木

translation: 红木恶魔讲台, 红木鹰形讲台, 铁栏杆, 石灰石螺旋楼梯, 极地宠物栖息地

translation: 你现在可以建造：天体地球仪, 修剪整齐的树篱, 橡木拉杆, 橡木密室梯子, 钢制笼, 华丽联赛雕像, 柚木玩具盒

english: You can now build: Revitalisation pool, Dungeon entrance, Marble altar, Skeleton guard, Oak and steel cage, Consecrated pet house
translation: 你现在可以建造：活力池, 地牢入口, 大理石祭坛, 骷髅守卫, 橡木钢笼, 圣化宠物屋

english: You can now build: Mahogany wardrobe (bedroom), Redwood fence, Otherworldly theme, Spirit tree, Garden fence, Large fountain, Magic tree, Gilded marble altar, Steel cage'
translation: 你现在可以建造：红木衣柜 (卧室), 红杉栅栏, 异世主题, 灵魂树, 花园栅栏, 大喷泉, 魔法树, 镀金大理石祭坛, 钢制笼

english: You can now build: Crystalline portal nexus Natural pet house'
translation: 你现在可以建造：水晶传送枢纽 自然宠物屋

english: You can now cook meat pies,pike and prepare cavefish. Members can also make nettle tea and Short Green Guys.
translation: 你现在可以烹饪肉派、狗鱼和准备洞鱼。会员还可以制作荨麻茶和矮个子绿人。

english: Members can now make scrambled egg and tomato.
translation: 会员现在可以制作炒鸡蛋和番茄。

english: You can now cook apple pies and tuna. Members can now cook worm holes, Leckish fish and Giral bats, and spit roast chompy bird.
translation: 你现在可以烹饪苹果派和金枪鱼。会员现在可以烹饪虫洞、莱基什鱼和吉拉尔蝙蝠，以及叉烤食人鸟。

english: Members can now cook fishcakes.
translation: 会员现在可以烹饪鱼饼。

english: You are now qualified to enter the prestigious Chefs' Guild. Members may also create Drunk Dragons.
translation: 你现在有资格进入著名的厨师公会。会员还可以制作醉龙。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪朱比利鸟和辣肉酱烤土豆。

translation: 会员现在可以制作番茄炒蛋烤土豆。

translation: 会员现在可以酿造杀戮者的喘息。

translation: 会员现在可以制作金枪鱼甜玉米烤土豆。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪火龙果派。

translation: 会员现在可以制作布鲁杜护盾和柚木鸟屋。

translation: 会员现在可以制作蛇形头盔。

translation: 你现在可以制作钻石项链、蛇皮盾和巨型口袋。

english: Members can now craft blue dragonhide armour.
translation: 会员现在可以制作蓝龙皮盔甲。

english: Members can now craft dragonstone necklaces and crystal legs.
translation: 会员现在可以制作龙石项链和水晶腿甲。

english: Members can now craft dragonstone bracelets and crystal bodies.
translation: 会员现在可以制作龙石手镯和水晶身体护甲。

translation: 会员现在可以制作多格舒恩光球和紫水晶标枪头。

translation: 会员现在可以穿戴班多斯盔甲和第三纪元战士盔甲！

translation: 会员现在可以穿戴阿玛迪尔盔甲、阿弗尼克格挡匕首、巴罗斯墓穴盔甲、硫磺靴和奈提兹诺面罩！

english: You can now grow Teak trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植柚木树了。

english: You can now burn Magic Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Magic Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧魔法原木，并用魔法原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: You can now burn Redwood Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Redwood Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧红杉原木，并用红杉原木点亮深渊灯笼。

translation: 你现在可以尝试用飞蝇钓法钓鳟鱼和洞鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以在化石岛使用流刺网捕鱼（需要44级猎人）。

translation: 会员现在可以尝试用鱼叉捕鲨鱼。

english: You can now make blurite/oak crossbows and blurite crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作蓝铁/橡木弩和蓝铁弩箭。

translation: 你现在可以制作有毒的吹箭筒。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金箭。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金'粗制'箭和精金标枪。

english: You can now make a heavy ballista and fletch yew shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作重型弩炮和组装紫杉盾。

translation: 你现在可以制作龙/魔法弩。

translation: 你现在可以制作魔法短弓。

english: You can now make guam tar
translation: 你现在可以制作瓜姆焦油了。

english: You can now make stat restore potions, compost potions and Guthix balance potion.
translation: 你现在可以制作属性恢复药水、堆肥药水和古斯平衡药水了。

english: You can now make prayer restore potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作祈祷恢复药水了。

english: You can now clean kwuarm.
translation: 你现在可以清理库阿姆草了。

english: You can now make super strength potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作超级力量药水了。

english: You can now use the Herb Sack and make hunting mix.
translation: 你现在可以使用草药袋并制作狩猎混合剂了。

english: You can now make Saradomin brew.
translation: 你现在可以制作萨拉多明酿了。

english: You can now make super antifire potions (after Dragon Slayer II) and ancient mix.
translation: 你现在可以制作超级抗火药水（完成屠龙者 II 后）和远古混合剂了。

english: You can now make super anti-venom potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作超级抗毒药水了。

english: You can now smoke your traps to remove the human scent from them.
translation: 你现在可以烟熏你的陷阱，去除上面的人类气味。

english: You can now catch eclectic implings and craft bees on a stick.
translation: 你现在可以捕捉折衷精灵并制作蜜蜂棒了。

english: You can now catch magpie implings.
translation: 你现在可以捕捉喜鹊精灵了。

english: You can now catch Murng bats.
translation: 你现在可以捕捉穆恩蝙蝠了。

english: You can now catch lucky implings and place redwood birdhouse traps on Fossil Island.'
translation: 你现在可以捕捉幸运精灵并在化石岛放置红杉鸟屋陷阱了。

english: You can now cast Snare. Members can now equip the Tomes of Fire & Water and Slayer's Staff, and can cast Magic Dart and Iban Blast!
translation: 你现在可以施放陷阱术。会员现在可以装备火之书、水之书和杀戮者法杖，还可以施放魔法飞镖和伊班爆裂术！

translation: 你现在可以施放高级炼金术！

translation: 会员现在可以充能水之球！

translation: 会员现在可以充能土之球，装备萨玛隆的权杖，并在魔法训练场获得化骨为桃法术。

english: Members can now cast Wind Wave!
translation: 会员现在可以施放风浪术！

translation: 会员现在可以施放水浪术并装备第三纪元法杖！

translation: 会员现在可以施放土浪术，穿戴达贡海长袍，装备古代飞龙盾和古代权杖！

translation: 会员现在可以施放火浪术，并装备死亡法杖、光明法杖、平衡法杖、海洋三叉戟、升级版古代权杖和永恒靴！

english: Members can now cast Water Surge, Teleport Block, Teleport to Target and equip the Tumeken's Shadow!'
translation: 会员现在可以施放水之激流、传送封锁、传送至目标，并装备图梅肯之影！

english: You can now mine with rune pickaxes and Gilded pickaxes.
translation: 你现在可以使用符文镐和镀金镐采矿了。

english: You can now use the Prayer Rapid Heal, and members can now wield Void Knight equipment!
translation: 你现在可以使用快速治愈祈祷，会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: Members can now bless holy & unholy symbols and unlock Bologa's grape blessings!
translation: 会员现在可以祝福神圣与邪恶符号，并解锁博洛加的葡萄祝福！

english: You can now use the Prayer Chivalry if you have completed the King's Ransom quest's Knight Wave reward! Members can now wield Blessed spirit shields and wear Vestment stoles, croziers, and Devout boots!
translation: 如果你完成了国王的赎金任务的骑士波次奖励，你现在可以使用骑士精神祈祷！会员现在可以装备祝福精神盾牌，以及佩戴圣带、权杖和虔诚靴！

english: Members can now wield Void Knight equipment!'
translation: 会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: You can now build a bronze cannon for your boat.
translation: 你现在可以为你的船建造一座青铜大炮。

english: You can now dock your boat at Dognose Island.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在狗鼻岛。

english: You can now recruit Jobless Jim as a crewmate.
translation: 你现在可以招募无业的吉姆作为船员。

english: You can now dock your boat at Musa Point and purchase a Kandarin small boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在穆萨角，并购买一艘坎达林小船。

english: You can now build a range facility on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以在你的船上建造一个炉灶设施。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rimmington, use Bronze cannons, use Bronze salvaging hooks and salvage from Small shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在里明顿村，使用青铜大炮和青铜打捞钩，并从小型沉船中打捞物品。

english: You can now build a Bronze keel on your boat, use Iron cannons and start the Prying Times quest.
translation: 你现在可以在你的船上建造青铜龙骨，使用铁制大炮，并开始撬开宝箱任务。

english: You can now dock your boat at Last Light.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在最后之光。

english: You can now recruit Adventurer Ada as a crewmate, use Steel cannons and Iron salvaging hooks.
translation: 你现在可以招募冒险者艾达作为船员，使用钢制大炮和铁制打捞钩。

english: You can now dock your boat at Isle of Bones, use Mithril cannons and build an Oak cargo hold on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在骨头岛，使用秘银大炮，并在你的船上建造橡木货舱。

english: You can now build an Iron tiller on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以在你的船上建造铁制舵柄。

english: You can now build an Oak hull for your boat and use Adamant cannons.
translation: 你现在可以为你的船建造橡木船体，并使用精金大炮。

english: You can now dock your boat at Catherby.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯瑟比镇。

english: You can now dock your boat at Entrana with completion of Lost City.
translation: 完成失落之城后，你现在可以将船停靠在恩特纳岛。

english: You can now dock your boat at Cairn Island and build a Wind catcher on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯恩岛，并在你的船上建造捕风器。

english: You can now dock your boat at Witchaven and build an Oak mast with linen sails on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在女巫港，并在你的船上建造带有亚麻帆的橡木桅杆。

english: You can now dock your boat at Brimhaven and from the Ruins of Unkah, and use Rune cannons and fish from Pirate shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在布尔哈文镇和昂卡遗址，使用符文大炮，并从海盗沉船中钓鱼。

english: You can now recruit Spotter Virginia as a crewmate, and use Steel salvaging hooks.
translation: 你现在可以招募瞭望员弗吉尼亚作为船员，并使用钢制打捞钩。

english: You can now dock your boat at Ardougne.[sic] and build a Teak hull on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阿多尼城，并在你的船上建造柚木船体。

english: You can now dock your boat at Void Knight's Outpost and build a Teak cargo hold on your boat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在虚空骑士前哨站，并在你的船上建造柚木货舱。

english: Congratulations, you just reached the Sailing Beta's maximum level. You will not be able to level up anymore. Your Sailing level is now 30.
translation: 恭喜，你已达到航海测试版的最高等级。你将无法再升级。你的航海等级现在是30级。

english: You have reached the highest level in the Beta! You can now take on the Tempor Tamtrum Barracuda trial, dock at Port Khazard and Corsair Cove, and use Dragon cannons.
translation: 你已经达到了测试版的最高等级！你现在可以接受坦波尔·坦特鲁姆·梭鱼试炼，停靠在卡扎德港和海盗湾，并使用龙族大炮。

english: You can now chop with a Rune Axe and Gilded Axe.
translation: 你现在可以使用符文斧和镀金斧砍伐了。

english: Members can now cut down Mahogany Trees and craft Clothes Pouches.
translation: 会员现在可以砍伐桃花心木树并制作衣服袋。

english: Members can now chop with a Dragon Axe or Infernal Axe.
translation: 会员现在可以使用龙金斧或地狱斧砍伐。
